characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion. She has blonde hair parted in the middle with darker roots, and a distinct mole on her right cheek.
characters.wardrobe: Black sleeveless top with a subtle, shiny grid pattern. White wireless earbuds in both ears.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Meetings में मुझे बहुत घबराहट होती थी। [I used to get very nervous in meetings.]
Character A says: English अच्छी नहीं थी, तो कुछ गलत बोलने के डर से मैं हमेशा चुप रहती थी। [My English wasn't good, so for fear of saying something wrong, I always stayed quiet.]
Character A says: फिर एक दोस्त ने मुझे Supernova के बारे में बताया और मैंने सोचा, try करने में क्या हर्ज़ है? [Then a friend told me about Supernova and I thought, what's the harm in trying?]
Character A says: मैंने रोज़ सिर्फ 10 मिनट practice शुरू की। [I started practicing for just 10 minutes a day.]
Character A says: ये बहुत आसान था। [That was easy.]
Character A says: इस app का AI tutor आपको असल ज़िंदगी की English सिखाता है, जैसे office में कैसे बात करें या अपने ideas कैसे share करें। [This app's AI tutor teaches you real-life English, like how to talk in the office or how to share your ideas.]
Character A says: कुछ ही हफ़्तों में सब बदल गया। [In just a few weeks, everything changed.]
Character A says: अब मैं बिना डरे meetings में बात कर सकती हूँ। [Now I can talk in meetings without any fear.]
Character A says: अब वो awkward silence नहीं होता, और लोग क्या सोचेंगे, इसकी फ़िक्र नहीं होती। [Now there is no awkward silence, and I don't worry about what people will think of me.]
Character A says: Supernova ने सिर्फ मेरी English नहीं सुधारी, मुझे confidence दिया है। [Supernova didn't just improve my English, it gave me confidence.]
Character A says: अगर आप भी मेरी तरह feel करते हैं, तो आज ही Supernova download करें। [So if you ever felt like me, download Supernova today.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable workplace pain point: fear of speaking English in meetings.
- Introduces Supernova as an accessible, low-pressure solution (10 mins/day with an AI tutor).
- Delivers the emotional payoff of overcoming judgment and gaining real confidence.
- Ends with a warm, encouraging call to action from a peer perspective.

scenes.scene_summary:
- Displays the final brand logo and app name.
- Reinforces the core value proposition (AI English tutor).
- Provides a clear call-to-action button to download the app.
